description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image. Add a pages job (default test stage) that runs apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -qq nodejs, then bundle install -j4, then bundle exec rake generate, moves the generated site with mv public .public and mv .public/octopress public, and publishes the resulting public/ directory as a Pages artifact. Configure the job to run only on the master branch and to deploy the artifact to GitLab Pages. No additional services, caches, or variables are required.
